name: life-on-the-line
description: Grant Achatz & Nick Kokonas's story of building Alinea, battling stage IV cancer, and redefining fine dining — the pursuit of perfection, the power of partnership, and the will to keep going when everything is on the line.
useCase: Chasing creative excellence, finding a business partner, navigating a health crisis, innovating through constraints, rebuilding after devastation.
knownRisks: Achatz's treatment decisions were specific to his case — not medical advice
The restaurant business model described (tasting menu, no choices) is high-risk and not generally applicable
The book is a dual memoir — some details may be reconstructed from memory
